pred_reason: The contract uses unsafe external calls with limited gas (Finding 3) and lacks proper state updates before these calls (Finding 2), matching SWC-107. Evidence: ETH transfers use .send() with 2300 gas limit risking failures (Finding 3); State changes occur after external calls in payment functions (Finding 2); Unsafe arithmetic in transfer/transferFrom without overflow checks (Finding 5)

raw.pred_reason: The contract uses unsafe external calls with limited gas (Finding 3) and lacks proper state updates before these calls (Finding 2), matching SWC-107. Additionally, arithmetic operations in SMTToken functions (Finding 5) and SafeMath issues (Finding 6) indicate integer overflow/underflow risks aligning with SWC-101. Evidence: ETH transfers use .send() with 2300 gas limit risking failures (Finding 3); State changes occur after external calls in payment functions (Finding 2); Unsafe arithmetic in transfer/transferFrom without overflow checks (Finding 5)
